name: Bundle Validator - Full Bundle Audit
description: Validates that the Bundle Validator performs a comprehensive audit covering existence, dependencies, alternatives, and complementary suggestions using all available tools.

parts.text: Run a full audit on this bundle: deploy-to-k8s, helm-chart-review, k8s-troubleshooting. Check dependencies, alternatives, and suggest any missing complementary skills.

Full audit complete for bundle [deploy-to-k8s, helm-chart-review, k8s-troubleshooting].

Existence: All 3 skills found in the graph.
Dependencies: deploy-to-k8s depends on helm-chart-review (already in bundle). No missing dependencies.
Alternatives: No redundant ALTERNATIVE_TO pairs detected.
Suggestions: Consider adding container-security-scan which COMPLEMENTS deploy-to-k8s.

Overall: VALID with 1 suggestion.

args.cypher_query: MATCH (a:Skill)-[:ALTERNATIVE_TO]-(b:Skill) WHERE (a.name IN $names OR a.id IN $names) AND (b.name IN $names OR b.id IN $names) RETURN coalesce(a.name, a.id) AS skill_a, coalesce(b.name, b.id) AS skill_b
